text: 305- خرج فيه عن أبي جعفر عليه السلام: قبضت والحمد لله وقد عرفت الوجوه التي صارت إليك منها غفر الله لك ولهم الذنوب ورحمنا وإياكم.

en.sayyid-athar-husain-s-h-rizvi: H 305 - The following epistle was issued from Imam Jawad (a.s) about him: Praise be to Allah, I have received the amount and noticed that you have borne some of the expenses yourself. Almighty Allah would forgive your and their sins and would be merciful to us and you.
